enonce.texte:
Read the list of national holidays below. Match each holiday with its correct date.

  • Independence Day
  • Youth Day
  • National Day

questions.texte: Match Independence Day with its date.
questions.reponse: January 1st

questions.texte: Match Youth Day with its date.
questions.reponse: February 11th

questions.texte: Match National Day with its date.
questions.reponse: May 20th

intitule: Understanding the Meaning of National Holidays

enonce.texte: Read the descriptions of national holidays and identify which holiday is being described. Choose from: Independence Day, Youth Day, National Day.

questions.texte: This holiday celebrates the creation of the Republic of Cameroon.
questions.reponse: National Day

questions.texte: This holiday celebrates the independence of Cameroon from colonial rule.
questions.reponse: Independence Day

questions.texte: This holiday celebrates the youth of the country and their role in nation-building.
questions.reponse: Youth Day

enonce.texte: You are a radio journalist announcing a national holiday. Identify the key information (date, reason, activities).

questions.texte: What is the date of Independence Day?
questions.reponse: January 1st

questions.texte: Why is Youth Day celebrated?
questions.reponse: To celebrate the youth and their role in nation-building.

questions.texte: What is the meaning of National Day?
questions.reponse: It celebrates the creation of the Republic of Cameroon.

enonce.texte: Write 4-5 sentences to describe a national holiday in Cameroon. Include the name of the holiday, its date, what it means, and what people do.

questions.texte: Describe Independence Day in 4-5 sentences.
questions.reponse: Independence Day is celebrated on January 1st. It marks the day Cameroon became independent. People celebrate with parades, songs, and flags. Families gather to eat traditional food and share joy.

questions.texte: Describe Youth Day in 4-5 sentences.
questions.reponse: Youth Day is celebrated on February 11th. It is a day to honor young people in Cameroon. Schools organize marches and events. It reminds us that youth are the future of the nation.

questions.texte: Describe National Day in 4-5 sentences.
questions.reponse: National Day is celebrated on May 20th. It marks the creation of the Republic of Cameroon. People celebrate with parades and cultural performances. It is a day of pride and unity for all citizens.

intitule: Creating a Dialogue About National Holidays

enonce.texte: Create a short dialogue between two students talking about a national holiday. Include the name, date, meaning, and activities.

questions.texte: Write a dialogue (6-8 exchanges) about National Day.
questions.reponse:
Student A: Hello! Do you know what day is May 20th?
Student B: Yes, it is National Day!
Student A: What does it celebrate?
Student B: It celebrates the creation of the Republic of Cameroon.
Student A: How do people celebrate?
Student B: They have parades and sing the national anthem.
Student A: I love watching the parades! It is a happy day for everyone.

enonce.texte: Complete the sentences with the correct holiday: Independence Day, Youth Day, National Day.

questions.texte: ______ is celebrated on February 11th.
questions.reponse: Youth Day

questions.texte: ______ is celebrated on January 1st.
questions.reponse: Independence Day

questions.texte: ______ is celebrated on May 20th.
questions.reponse: National Day

enonce.texte: Read the answers and write the correct questions using: When, Why, What, How.

questions.texte: Answer: Independence Day is celebrated on January 1st.
questions.reponse: Question: When is Independence Day celebrated?

questions.texte: Answer: Youth Day is a day to honor young people.
questions.reponse: Question: Why is Youth Day celebrated?

questions.texte: Answer: People celebrate with parades and songs.
questions.reponse: Question: How do people celebrate National Day?

enonce.texte:
Read the following description and answer the questions below.

'National Day is celebrated every year on May 20th. It is a very important day for Cameroonians. People attend parades, sing the national anthem, and wear traditional clothes. It is a day of joy and pride.'

questions.texte: What is the date of National Day?
questions.reponse: May 20th

questions.texte: Why is it an important day?
questions.reponse: It marks the creation of the Republic of Cameroon and is a day of pride and unity.

questions.texte: List three activities people do on National Day.
questions.reponse: People attend parades, sing the national anthem, and wear traditional clothes.

enonce.texte: Choose your favorite national holiday and explain why you like it. Use: I like / I don't like / I prefer.

questions.texte: Write 3-4 sentences about your favorite national holiday.
questions.reponse: I prefer National Day because there are many parades. I love to see the colorful traditional clothes. I like the singing and dancing. It is a happy day for all Cameroonians.

intitule: Creating a Calendar of National Holidays

enonce.texte:
Read the statements and complete the table with the correct information.

  • Independence Day is on January 1st
  • Youth Day is on February 11th
  • National Day is on May 20th

questions.texte: Complete the table: Holiday, Date, Meaning.
questions.reponse:
Independence Day - January 1st - Independence from colonial rule.
Youth Day - February 11th - Celebration of young people.
National Day - May 20th - Creation of the Republic.
